[Uploading jasworths_profile (6).html…]()
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Jasworths Sports – Company Profile</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;0,700;0,800;0,900;1,700&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --navy: #0a1628;
  --blue: #0d1f3c;
  --red: #cc1f1f;
  --red-light: #e63333;
  --white: #f8f6f2;
  --off-white: #c8d0dc;
  --dark: #060e1a;
  --mid: #111d30;
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden}
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:1000;opacity:0.3}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:500;padding:20px 60px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;transition:background 0.4s,backdrop-filter 0.4s}
nav.scrolled{background:rgba(6,14,26,0.96);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.25)}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white)}
.nav-logo span{color:var(--red)}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:36px;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(248,246,242,0.5);text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;transition:color 0.3s}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--red)}

/* SECTIONS */
section{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:100px 60px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}

/* HERO */
#hero{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%,#1a2a4a 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 30%,#2a0808 0%,transparent 50%),var(--dark)}
.hero-eyebrow{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);font-weight:600;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 0.8s 0.3s ease forwards}
.red-line{width:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--red),transparent);margin:20px auto;animation:expandLine 1.4s 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) forwards}
@keyframes expandLine{to{width:300px}}
.hero-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(80px,14vw,160px);font-weight:900;letter-spacing:0.02em;line-height:0.88;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 0.5s ease forwards}
.hero-title span{color:var(--red);font-style:italic}
.hero-sub{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--off-white);font-weight:400;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 0.8s 1s ease forwards;margin-top:8px}
.hero-tagline{margin-top:40px;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(14px,1.8vw,18px);font-weight:300;color:rgba(200,208,220,0.8);opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 0.8s 1.3s ease forwards;max-width:580px;line-height:1.7}
.scroll-hint{position:absolute;bottom:40px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;opacity:0;animation:fadeIn 1s 2s ease forwards}
.scroll-hint span{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:4px;color:var(--red);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600}
.scroll-hint .line{width:1px;height:40px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--red),transparent);animation:pulse-line 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pulse-line{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.3}}

/* HERO PHOTO STRIP */
.hero-photo-strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:3px;margin-top:56px;width:100%;max-width:1100px;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 1.6s ease forwards}
.hero-photo-strip .photo-frame{overflow:hidden;height:200px;position:relative}
.hero-photo-strip .photo-frame img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform 0.7s ease;filter:brightness(0.8)}
.hero-photo-strip .photo-frame:hover img{transform:scale(1.06);filter:brightness(1)}
.hero-photo-strip .photo-frame .overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 50%,rgba(6,14,26,0.65))}
.strip-label{position:absolute;bottom:12px;left:16px;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(248,246,242,0.7);font-weight:600}

/* DIVIDER */
.divider{width:100%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(204,31,31,0.35),transparent)}

/* ABOUT */
#about{background:var(--blue)}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;max-width:1200px;width:100%;align-items:center}
.about-image{overflow:hidden;height:480px;position:relative;border-left:3px solid var(--red)}
.about-image img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(0.9);transition:transform 0.8s ease}
.about-image:hover img{transform:scale(1.04)}
.about-image .img-caption{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:20px 24px;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(6,14,26,0.9),transparent);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);font-weight:600}

.section-label{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;font-weight:600}
.section-label::before{content:'';width:40px;height:2px;background:var(--red);flex-shrink:0}
.section-heading{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(48px,6vw,80px);font-weight:800;line-height:0.95;margin-bottom:28px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.01em}
.section-heading em{color:var(--red);font-style:italic}
.body-text{font-size:14px;line-height:1.85;color:rgba(200,208,220,0.8);font-weight:300}

.about-stats{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0}
.stat-item{border:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.2);padding:28px 32px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:rgba(10,22,40,0.4);transition:background 0.3s}
.stat-item:hover{background:rgba(204,31,31,0.08)}
.stat-item::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:0;background:var(--red);transition:width 0.6s ease}
.stat-item.visible::before{width:3px}
.stat-number{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:56px;font-weight:800;color:var(--white);line-height:1;text-transform:uppercase}
.stat-number span{color:var(--red)}
.stat-label{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--off-white);margin-top:4px;font-weight:500;opacity:0.6}

/* GALLERY */
#gallery-strip{min-height:auto;padding:3px 0;background:var(--dark);display:block}
.photo-gallery{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:3px}
.gallery-frame{overflow:hidden;position:relative;cursor:pointer}
.gallery-frame.tall{grid-row:span 2}
.gallery-frame img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;filter:brightness(0.82);transition:transform 0.7s ease,filter 0.4s ease}
.gallery-frame:hover img{transform:scale(1.08);filter:brightness(1)}
.gallery-frame .g-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 55%,rgba(6,14,26,0.65));pointer-events:none}

/* MARKET */
#market{background:var(--dark);flex-direction:column}
.market-inner{max-width:1200px;width:100%}
.market-header{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 2fr;gap:60px;margin-bottom:60px;align-items:end}
.market-metrics{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px}
.metric-card{background:rgba(13,31,60,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.15);border-top:3px solid var(--red);padding:48px 36px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:transform 0.4s,border-color 0.4s}
.metric-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);border-color:rgba(204,31,31,0.6)}
.metric-value{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(42px,5vw,64px);font-weight:800;color:var(--white);display:block;margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1;text-transform:uppercase}
.metric-value sup{font-size:0.45em;color:var(--red);vertical-align:super;font-weight:800}
.metric-desc{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);font-weight:600}
.metric-body{font-size:12px;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(200,208,220,0.55);margin-top:14px;font-weight:300}

/* GROWTH */
#growth{background:var(--blue);flex-direction:column}
.growth-inner{max-width:1200px;width:100%}
.growth-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:center;margin-top:60px}
.growth-image{overflow:hidden;height:400px;border-top:3px solid var(--red);position:relative}
.growth-image img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(0.82);transition:transform 0.8s}
.growth-image:hover img{transform:scale(1.05)}
.growth-image .img-label{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:16px 20px;background:rgba(6,14,26,0.85);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);font-weight:600}
.growth-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;background:rgba(204,31,31,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.4);border-left:3px solid var(--red);padding:16px 28px;margin-top:28px;margin-bottom:28px}
.growth-badge .pct{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:40px;color:var(--red);font-weight:800;line-height:1}
.growth-badge .lbl{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(200,208,220,0.7);font-weight:500;line-height:1.5}
.chart-bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:12px;height:180px;margin-top:8px}
.bar-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex:1}
.bar{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--red),rgba(204,31,31,0.2));border-radius:2px 2px 0 0;transform:scaleY(0);transform-origin:bottom;transition:transform 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);position:relative}
.bar.visible{transform:scaleY(1)}
.bar-value{position:absolute;top:-26px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--red);white-space:nowrap;font-weight:700}
.bar-year{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(200,208,220,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500}

/* SERVICES */
#services{background:var(--dark);flex-direction:column}
.services-inner{max-width:1200px;width:100%}
.services-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:56px}
.service-card{padding:56px 40px;background:rgba(13,31,60,0.5);border:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.1);border-top:3px solid transparent;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all 0.4s}
.service-card:hover{background:rgba(13,31,60,0.8);border-top-color:var(--red)}
.service-number{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:90px;font-weight:900;color:rgba(204,31,31,0.08);line-height:1;margin-bottom:-24px;transition:color 0.4s}
.service-card:hover .service-number{color:rgba(204,31,31,0.18)}
.service-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:14px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.02em}
.service-title::after{content:'';display:block;width:32px;height:2px;background:var(--red);margin-top:12px;transition:width 0.4s}
.service-card:hover .service-title::after{width:60px}

/* MISSION / VISION */
#mission{background:var(--blue);flex-direction:column}
#vision{background:var(--dark);flex-direction:column}
.mission-inner,.vision-inner{max-width:1200px;width:100%}
.mission-pillars,.vision-pillars{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:56px}
.pillar{padding:48px 40px;border:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.12);background:rgba(10,22,40,0.5);transition:all 0.4s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.pillar::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:var(--red);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform 0.5s ease}
.pillar:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.pillar-num{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--red);letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:16px;font-weight:700}
.pillar-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:30px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.1;text-transform:uppercase}

/* MAP */
#map-section{background:var(--blue);flex-direction:column;min-height:80vh}
.map-inner{max-width:1200px;width:100%}
.district-map-wrap{margin-top:56px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3px;align-items:start}
.uploaded-map{position:relative;border-top:3px solid var(--red);overflow:hidden}
.uploaded-map img{width:100%;display:block;filter:sepia(20%) hue-rotate(190deg) brightness(0.68) contrast(1.1)}
.uploaded-map .map-footer{padding:12px 20px;background:rgba(6,14,26,0.9);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(204,31,31,0.7);border-top:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.2);font-weight:600}
.map-pin-abs{position:absolute;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;cursor:default}
.pin-dot{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--red);animation:ping 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.pin-dot.d2{animation-delay:0.8s}
@keyframes ping{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(204,31,31,0.7)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 12px rgba(204,31,31,0)}}
.pin-label{background:rgba(6,14,26,0.92);border:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.6);padding:4px 10px;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);white-space:nowrap;font-weight:700}
.svg-map-wrap{border-top:3px solid var(--red);padding:36px;background:rgba(10,22,40,0.6)}
.locations-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;margin-top:24px}
.loc-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:16px;padding:20px;border:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.12);background:rgba(13,31,60,0.4);transition:background 0.3s}
.loc-item:hover{background:rgba(204,31,31,0.08)}
.loc-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--red);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:6px;animation:ping 2s infinite}
.loc-dot.d2{animation-delay:1s}
.loc-name{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);text-transform:uppercase}
.loc-detail{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(200,208,220,0.45);margin-top:4px;font-weight:500}

/* CONTACT */
#contact{background:var(--dark);flex-direction:column;min-height:60vh}
.contact-inner{max-width:900px;width:100%;text-align:center}
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-top:60px}
.contact-item{padding:48px 40px;border:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.15);border-top:3px solid var(--red);background:rgba(13,31,60,0.4);transition:background 0.4s}
.contact-item:hover{background:rgba(204,31,31,0.08)}
.contact-label{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:16px;font-weight:700}
.contact-value{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--white);font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px}
.contact-phone{margin-top:10px;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:28px;color:rgba(200,208,220,0.7);font-weight:300}

/* FOOTER */
.site-footer{background:var(--dark);border-top:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.2);padding:32px 60px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.footer-logo{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase}
.footer-logo span{color:var(--red)}
.footer-copy{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(200,208,220,0.3);font-weight:500}

/* ANIMATIONS */
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes fadeIn{to{opacity:1}}
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(36px);transition:opacity 0.75s ease,transform 0.75s ease}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.reveal-delay-1{transition-delay:0.15s}
.reveal-delay-2{transition-delay:0.3s}
.reveal-delay-3{transition-delay:0.45s}

@media(max-width:900px){
  section{padding:80px 24px}
  .about-grid,.market-metrics,.services-grid,.mission-pillars,.vision-pillars,.district-map-wrap,.contact-grid,.growth-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .market-header{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:28px}
  nav{padding:18px 24px}
  .nav-links{display:none}
  .hero-photo-strip{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .photo-gallery{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .site-footer{flex-direction:column;gap:12px;text-align:center}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav id="nav">
  <div class="nav-logo">Jasworths <span>Sports</span></div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#market">Market</a></li>
    <li><a href="#growth">Growth</a></li>
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#mission">Mission</a></li>
    <li><a href="#map-section">Locations</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- ═══ HERO ═══ -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-eyebrow">Est. 1920s — Bethal, Mpumalanga</div>
  <div class="red-line"></div>
  <h1 class="hero-title">JASWORTHS<br><span>Sports</span></h1>
  <div class="red-line" style="animation-delay:0.9s"></div>
  <p class="hero-sub">Elevating Sports in Mpumalanga's Active Community</p>
  <p class="hero-tagline">The Go-To Destination for Dedicated Runners, Cyclists,<br>and Outdoor Sports Enthusiasts in the Gert Sibande Region</p>
  <div class="hero-photo-strip">
    <div class="photo-frame">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Performance shoe wall">
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="strip-label">Footwear</div>
    </div>
    <div class="photo-frame">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Salomon trail shoe">
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="strip-label">Technical Running</div>
    </div>
    <div class="photo-frame">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Titleist Pro V1 golf balls">
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="strip-label">Premium Brands</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">
    <span>Scroll</span>
    <div class="line"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ ABOUT ═══ -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Our Story</div>
      <h2 class="section-heading">A Legacy<br>Built on<br><em>Passion</em></h2>
      <p class="body-text" style="margin-bottom:32px">Founded in the 1920s in Bethal, Mpumalanga — humble family-owned roots evolving over generations. Today, Jasworths stands as the leading independent destination for premium sportswear, footwear, and apparel in the Gert Sibande region.</p>
      <p class="body-text">Our heartbeat is our people — staff and customers — driving success through genuine relationships built on service, authenticity, trust, and community.</p>
      <div class="about-stats" style="margin-top:40px">
        <div class="stat-item reveal reveal-delay-1">
          <div class="stat-number">100<span>+</span></div>
          <div class="stat-label">Years of Heritage</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item reveal reveal-delay-2">
          <div class="stat-number">2</div>
          <div class="stat-label">Store Locations</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item reveal reveal-delay-3">
          <div class="stat-number">Tier <span>1</span></div>
          <div class="stat-label">Brand Access</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-item reveal" style="transition-delay:0.6s">
          <div class="stat-number">299<span>K</span></div>
          <div class="stat-label">Transactions (2022)</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-image reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Adidas padel racket and Wilson bag">
      <div class="img-caption">Premium Brand Selection</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══ GALLERY ═══ -->
<section id="gallery-strip">
  <div class="photo-gallery">
    <div class="gallery-frame tall" style="height:400px">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Performance shoe wall">
      <div class="g-overlay"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-frame" style="height:197px">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Salomon Sense Ride trail shoe">
      <div class="g-overlay"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-frame" style="height:197px">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Wilson padel gear">
      <div class="g-overlay"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-frame" style="height:197px">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sports equipment shelves">
      <div class="g-overlay"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-frame" style="height:197px">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Titleist Pro V1 golf balls">
      <div class="g-overlay"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-frame" style="height:197px">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Padel rackets on display">
      <div class="g-overlay"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-frame" style="height:197px">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Technical footwear detail">
      <div class="g-overlay"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-frame" style="height:197px">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Premium golf accessories">
      <div class="g-overlay"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══ MARKET ═══ -->
<section id="market">
  <div class="market-inner">
    <div class="market-header">
      <div class="reveal">
        <div class="section-label">The Marketplace</div>
        <h2 class="section-heading">Gert<br>Sibande<br><em>District</em></h2>
      </div>
      <p class="body-text reveal reveal-delay-1">Located in Bethal and Secunda, Jasworths provides premium sports equipment to the entire Gert Sibande District. We capture the high-LSM market by offering exclusive access, specialized knowledge, and a curated environment that chain stores cannot replicate.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="market-metrics">
      <div class="metric-card reveal">
        <span class="metric-value">1.47<sup>M</sup></span>
        <div class="metric-desc">Population</div>
        <div class="metric-body">A substantial regional consumer base across the Gert Sibande District.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="metric-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <span class="metric-value">R40<sup>K+</sup></span>
        <div class="metric-desc">LSM per Month</div>
        <div class="metric-body">Engineers, executives, and dedicated local athletes — our core audience comfortably affords premium price points of R3,500+.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="metric-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <span class="metric-value">R144<sup>B</sup></span>
        <div class="metric-desc">Regional GDP</div>
        <div class="metric-body">A high-value economic environment supporting top-tier pricing models without relying on markdowns.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══ GROWTH ═══ -->
<section id="growth">
  <div class="growth-inner">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Financial Performance</div>
      <h2 class="section-heading">Consistent<br><em>Year-on-Year</em><br>Growth</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="growth-layout">
      <div class="growth-image reveal">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Well-stocked sports shelves">
        <div class="img-label">Premium Stock Depth</div>
      </div>
      <div class="reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <p class="body-text">Jasworths has demonstrated steady financial growth of <strong style="color:var(--red)">12–15% annually</strong>, driven by a strategic pivot towards high-value technical apparel and footwear. Our average basket size continues to increase, reflecting our successful transition to a higher LSM customer base.</p>
        <div class="growth-badge">
          <span class="pct">+12–15%</span>
          <span class="lbl">Year on Year<br>Revenue Growth</span>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-bars" id="chartBars"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══ SERVICES ═══ -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="services-inner">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Services</div>
      <h2 class="section-heading">What We<br>Offer<br><em>Always</em></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="services-grid">
      <div class="service-card reveal">
        <div class="service-number">01</div>
        <div class="service-title">Gait Analysis &amp; Biomechanical Fitting</div>
        <p class="body-text">We don't just sell shoes; we fit athletes. Our staff analyze running styles and recommend the perfect technical footwear for injury prevention and performance.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="service-number">02</div>
        <div class="service-title">Premium Tier-1 Brand Access</div>
        <p class="body-text">We curate an exclusive selection of global performance brands — Hoka, Brooks, Saucony, On — not available in standard mass-market chain stores.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="service-number">03</div>
        <div class="service-title">Community Run Clubs &amp; Events</div>
        <p class="body-text">We are the hub of local running culture, offering weekly group runs, training advice, and active support for local races and women's fitness initiatives.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══ MISSION ═══ -->
<section id="mission">
  <div class="mission-inner">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Our Mission</div>
      <h2 class="section-heading">The Undisputed<br><em>Premier</em><br>Destination</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="body-text reveal reveal-delay-1" style="max-width:700px;margin-top:16px">At Jasworths, our mission is to bridge the gap between global innovation and the local athlete — offering a specialized environment that rivals metropolitan flagship stores, empowering our community from the dedicated marathon runner to the aspiring Gen Z enthusiast.</p>
    <div class="mission-pillars">
      <div class="pillar reveal">
        <div class="pillar-num">— 01</div>
        <div class="pillar-title">Elevate the Experience</div>
        <p class="body-text">To transform the local retail landscape by offering a premium, world-class shopping environment that reflects global brand standards.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="pillar reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="pillar-num">— 02</div>
        <div class="pillar-title">Champion Performance</div>
        <p class="body-text">To shift the market focus from comfort to technical performance, providing expert biomechanical advice and top-tier running gear.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="pillar reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="pillar-num">— 03</div>
        <div class="pillar-title">Empower the Community</div>
        <p class="body-text">To serve as the cultural hub for local sports, actively supporting women's running, Gen Z athletes, and the everyday pursuit of personal bests.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══ VISION ═══ -->
<section id="vision">
  <div class="vision-inner">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Our Vision</div>
      <h2 class="section-heading">A Modern<br><em>High-Energy</em><br>Hub</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="body-text reveal reveal-delay-1" style="max-width:700px;margin-top:16px">We envision a local marketplace where serious athletes no longer need to travel to major cities to find Tier-1 performance gear. We are actively pivoting our business model to prioritize premium performance over volume, curating a brand portfolio that reflects the aspirations, diversity, and technical needs of the modern consumer.</p>
    <div class="vision-pillars">
      <div class="pillar reveal">
        <div class="pillar-num">— 01</div>
        <div class="pillar-title">Uncompromising Expertise</div>
        <p class="body-text">Technical specialists committed to professional gait analysis and personalized fitting, ensuring every customer leaves with the right tool for their trade.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="pillar reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="pillar-num">— 02</div>
        <div class="pillar-title">Community Integration</div>
        <p class="body-text">Sponsoring local events, supporting the growth of women's running groups, and fostering a welcoming space for the next generation of athletes.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="pillar reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="pillar-num">— 03</div>
        <div class="pillar-title">Brand Guardianship</div>
        <p class="body-text">Upholding the global standards of the brands we represent through pristine visual merchandising, knowledgeable staff, and aspirational marketing.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══ MAP ═══ -->
<section id="map-section">
  <div class="map-inner">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Our Region</div>
      <h2 class="section-heading">Gert Sibande<br><em>District</em><br>Locations</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="body-text reveal reveal-delay-1" style="max-width:640px;margin-top:16px">Jasworths operates from Bethal and Secunda, serving the entire Gert Sibande District across Mpumalanga — from Chief Albert Luthuli in the north to Dr Pixley Ka Isaka Seme in the south.</p>
    <div class="district-map-wrap reveal">
      <div class="uploaded-map">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Gert Sibande District Municipality Map">
        <div class="map-pin-abs" style="top:37%;left:41%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)">
          <div class="pin-dot"></div>
          <div class="pin-label">Bethal</div>
        </div>
        <div class="map-pin-abs" style="top:50%;left:33%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)">
          <div class="pin-dot d2"></div>
          <div class="pin-label">Secunda</div>
        </div>
        <div class="map-footer">Serving All 7 Local Municipalities · Gert Sibande District</div>
      </div>
      <div class="svg-map-wrap">
        <div class="section-label" style="margin-bottom:16px">Store Locations</div>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white);line-height:1.1">Two Locations.<br><span style="color:var(--red)">One Standard.</span></h3>
        <div class="locations-list">
          <div class="loc-item">
            <div class="loc-dot"></div>
            <div>
              <div class="loc-name">Bethal — Main Branch</div>
              <div class="loc-detail">Govan Mbeki Local Municipality · Est. 1920s</div>
              <p class="body-text" style="margin-top:10px;font-size:13px">The original flagship. Our founding home in the heart of Bethal, serving the community for over a century.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="loc-item">
            <div class="loc-dot d2"></div>
            <div>
              <div class="loc-name">Secunda Branch</div>
              <div class="loc-detail">Govan Mbeki Local Municipality · Industrial Hub</div>
              <p class="body-text" style="margin-top:10px;font-size:13px">Serving Secunda's high-LSM professional community — engineers and executives in one of SA's most productive industrial regions.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:28px;padding:20px;border:1px solid rgba(204,31,31,0.2);background:rgba(10,22,40,0.7)">
          <div style="font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:14px;font-weight:700">District Municipalities</div>
          <svg viewBox="0 0 420 210" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%;height:auto">
            <rect x="8" y="65" width="88" height="52" rx="2" fill="rgba(13,31,60,0.7)" stroke="rgba(204,31,31,0.25)" stroke-width="1"/>
            <text x="52" y="86" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="7" fill="rgba(200,208,220,0.55)" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="1">DIPALESENG</text>
            <rect x="96" y="38" width="108" height="66" rx="2" fill="rgba(204,31,31,0.15)" stroke="rgba(204,31,31,0.7)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <text x="150" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="8" fill="rgba(204,31,31,0.95)" font-weight="700" letter-spacing="1">GOVAN MBEKI</text>
            <text x="150" y="74" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow" font-size="6" fill="rgba(204,31,31,0.7)" font-weight="400">Bethal · Secunda</text>
            <circle cx="128" cy="62" r="5" fill="var(--red)" opacity="0.95"/>
            <circle cx="164" cy="70" r="5" fill="var(--red)" opacity="0.95"/>
            <text x="116" y="82" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="5.5" fill="rgba(204,31,31,0.8)" font-weight="700">★</text>
            <text x="152" y="82" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="5.5" fill="rgba(204,31,31,0.8)" font-weight="700">★</text>
            <rect x="96" y="104" width="108" height="52" rx="2" fill="rgba(13,31,60,0.5)" stroke="rgba(204,31,31,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
            <text x="150" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="7" fill="rgba(200,208,220,0.5)" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="1">LEKWA</text>
            <rect x="204" y="14" width="108" height="78" rx="2" fill="rgba(13,31,60,0.4)" stroke="rgba(204,31,31,0.18)" stroke-width="1"/>
            <text x="258" y="50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="6.5" fill="rgba(200,208,220,0.45)" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="0.5">CHIEF ALBERT</text>
            <text x="258" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="6.5" fill="rgba(200,208,220,0.45)" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="0.5">LUTHULI</text>
            <rect x="204" y="92" width="108" height="60" rx="2" fill="rgba(13,31,60,0.4)" stroke="rgba(204,31,31,0.18)" stroke-width="1"/>
            <text x="258" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="7" fill="rgba(200,208,220,0.45)" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="0.5">MSUKALIGWA</text>
            <rect x="312" y="55" width="100" height="75" rx="2" fill="rgba(13,31,60,0.4)" stroke="rgba(204,31,31,0.18)" stroke-width="1"/>
            <text x="362" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="7" fill="rgba(200,208,220,0.45)" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="0.5">MKHONDO</text>
            <rect x="96" y="156" width="216" height="48" rx="2" fill="rgba(13,31,60,0.4)" stroke="rgba(204,31,31,0.18)" stroke-width="1"/>
            <text x="204" y="183" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="6" fill="rgba(200,208,220,0.45)" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="0.5">DR PIXLEY KA ISAKA SEME</text>
            <text x="8" y="206" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-size="6" fill="rgba(204,31,31,0.5)" font-weight="700" letter-spacing="1">★ JASWORTHS LOCATIONS</text>
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══ CONTACT ═══ -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="contact-inner">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label" style="justify-content:center">Visit Us</div>
      <h2 class="section-heading" style="text-align:center">Keep It<br><em>Moving</em></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-grid">
      <div class="contact-item reveal">
        <div class="contact-label">Bethal — Main Branch</div>
        <div class="contact-value">Info@jasworth.co.za</div>
        <div class="contact-phone">066 513 9184</div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-item reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="contact-label">Secunda Branch</div>
        <div class="contact-value">sc@jasworth.co.za</div>
        <div class="contact-phone">066 513 9184</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer class="site-footer">
  <div class="footer-logo">Jasworths <span>Sports</span></div>
  <div class="footer-copy">Est. 1920s · Bethal & Secunda · Mpumalanga</div>
</footer>

<script>
const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 60));

const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, {threshold:0.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal,.stat-item,.bar').forEach(el => io.observe(el));

// Growth chart
const chartData = [
  {year:'2020',value:100},
  {year:'2021',value:114},
  {year:'2022',value:130},
  {year:'2023',value:149},
  {year:'2024',value:169},
  {year:'2025',value:191},
];
const maxVal = 191;
const container = document.getElementById('chartBars');
chartData.forEach((d,i) => {
  const h = (d.value/maxVal)*165;
  const growth = i===0?'Base':`+${Math.round(((d.value/chartData[i-1].value)-1)*100)}%`;
  const g = document.createElement('div');
  g.className='bar-group';
  g.innerHTML=`<div class="bar" style="height:${h}px;transition-delay:${i*0.12}s"><span class="bar-value">${growth}</span></div><div class="bar-year">${d.year}</div>`;
  container.appendChild(g);
});
document.querySelectorAll('.bar').forEach(el => io.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
